profile.name: Wildan Syukri Niam
profile.headline: AI Researcher & Web3 Builder
about: I explore the intersection of AI agents, Web3 trust, and on-chain intelligence through research and real-world software systems.
My work focuses on how autonomous software can reason, transact, verify risk, and coordinate with clear evidence and human control.

research.narrative: I am especially interested in systems where AI agents do more than generate text: they observe state, use tools, reason over risk, coordinate, and take bounded actions with transparent evidence.

focus.name: AI Agents
focus.description: Autonomous workflows, tool use, agent reliability, and applied agent systems.

focus.name: Web3 Trust
focus.description: Safer transaction layers, address intelligence, and user-facing risk signals.

focus.name: Agentic Payments
focus.description: Payment infrastructure and wallet experiences designed for autonomous software.

projects.name: PayGate
projects.summary: A payment layer for monetizing API access through blockchain-based settlement.

projects.name: Fradium
projects.summary: Multi-chain address analysis and AI threat detection for safer Web3 activity.

projects.name: NovaAI
projects.summary: A chat-first wallet layer for analysis, transaction preparation, and payment workflows.

projects.name: Quorum
projects.summary: An exploration of coordination and accountability across autonomous agent systems.

footer: Building at the edge of AI agents, Web3 trust, and autonomous software.
